name: Line to Goal : Draw The Path
description: Line to Goal: Draw The Path is a casual soccer puzzle game where you draw the path and use physics to score amazing goals. Each level is a creative challenge with unique obstacles: bouncing walls, moving platforms, wind zones, icy surfaces, and tricky barriers. Easy to play, hard to master. Test your timing, accuracy, and strategy. Perfect for quick games anywhere.
instructions: Left click drag Hold down the left mouse button and drag the cursor to draw the line that will guide the ball toward the goal Clear Retry You can restart the level at any time using the reset button to redraw your strategy
